betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Dangerous Drops§f

§aRare and valuable items dropped by endgame threats — rewards for the brave!§f

§bDangerous Drops§f are unique items obtained from defeating or surviving the most dangerous endgame threats. These include items that help with crafting and progression.

§6Notable Drops§f:
§b• Items from §bDigamma§f-exposed creatures
§b• Unique components from §bFölkvangr-affected§f areas
§b• §bAncient Scrap Metal§f — required for Fau armor
§b• §bUFO Coin§f — required for Gerald construction

§6Strategy§f:
Most dangerous drops require confronting the most lethal threats in the mod — digamma radiation zones, Fölkvangr field remnants, and other post-endgame hazards.

§cWarning§f: Never attempt to retrieve drops from active Fölkvangr or digamma zones without Fau armor! The radiation levels are lethal even with standard hazmat gear.

§eTip§f: After surviving a DFC incident or exploring Gerald's crater, thoroughly scan the area for rare drops. Some items can only be obtained in these hazardous conditions. Use Fau armor for full protection.
